verses.text: 'Fret not thyself because of evildoers,' for they soon wither like grass; instead, 'trust in the LORD, and do good,' and 'delight thyself... in the LORD.' Envy of the wicked is folly. Joy in God is the cure for fretting over their brief success.

'Fret not thyself because of evildoers,' for they soon wither like grass; instead, 'trust in the LORD, and do good,' and 'delight thyself... in the LORD.' Envy of the wicked is folly. Joy in God is the cure for fretting over their brief success.

'Fret not thyself because of evildoers,' for they soon wither like grass; instead, 'trust in the LORD, and do good,' and 'delight thyself... in the LORD.' Envy of the wicked is folly. Joy in God is the cure for fretting over their brief success.

'Fret not thyself because of evildoers,' for they soon wither like grass; instead, 'trust in the LORD, and do good,' and 'delight thyself... in the LORD.' Envy of the wicked is folly. Joy in God is the cure for fretting over their brief success.

'Commit thy way unto the LORD; trust also in him; and he shall bring it to pass,' making your righteousness shine like the noon. Faith hands the future to God. He vindicates in His time those who entrust their cause to Him.

'Commit thy way unto the LORD; trust also in him; and he shall bring it to pass,' making your righteousness shine like the noon. Faith hands the future to God. He vindicates in His time those who entrust their cause to Him.

'Rest in the LORD, and wait patiently for him,' ceasing from anger, for evildoers shall be cut off while those who wait inherit the earth. Patience and peace are commanded. The end belongs not to the angry but to the trusting.

'Rest in the LORD, and wait patiently for him,' ceasing from anger, for evildoers shall be cut off while those who wait inherit the earth. Patience and peace are commanded. The end belongs not to the angry but to the trusting.

'Rest in the LORD, and wait patiently for him,' ceasing from anger, for evildoers shall be cut off while those who wait inherit the earth. Patience and peace are commanded. The end belongs not to the angry but to the trusting.

'Yet a little while, and the wicked shall not be,' but 'the meek shall inherit the earth' and delight in abundance of peace. Their day is short; the meek endure. Christ Himself confirms this blessing on the lowly.

'Yet a little while, and the wicked shall not be,' but 'the meek shall inherit the earth' and delight in abundance of peace. Their day is short; the meek endure. Christ Himself confirms this blessing on the lowly.

The wicked plot against the just and gnash their teeth, but the Lord laughs, seeing their day coming; their own sword shall pierce their heart. Their malice is doomed. God is unafraid of the schemes that frighten us.

The wicked plot against the just and gnash their teeth, but the Lord laughs, seeing their day coming; their own sword shall pierce their heart. Their malice is doomed. God is unafraid of the schemes that frighten us.

The wicked plot against the just and gnash their teeth, but the Lord laughs, seeing their day coming; their own sword shall pierce their heart. Their malice is doomed. God is unafraid of the schemes that frighten us.

The wicked plot against the just and gnash their teeth, but the Lord laughs, seeing their day coming; their own sword shall pierce their heart. Their malice is doomed. God is unafraid of the schemes that frighten us.

'A little that a righteous man hath is better than the riches of many wicked,' whose strength shall be broken. Quality outweighs quantity. A small portion with God's blessing is richer than great wealth without it.

'A little that a righteous man hath is better than the riches of many wicked,' whose strength shall be broken. Quality outweighs quantity. A small portion with God's blessing is richer than great wealth without it.
The LORD knows the days of the upright and gives them an enduring inheritance, while the wicked vanish like smoke. Two destinies again. God's people are kept; the wicked melt away.
The LORD knows the days of the upright and gives them an enduring inheritance, while the wicked vanish like smoke. Two destinies again. God's people are kept; the wicked melt away.
The LORD knows the days of the upright and gives them an enduring inheritance, while the wicked vanish like smoke. Two destinies again. God's people are kept; the wicked melt away.

The wicked borrows and does not repay, but the righteous is generous and gives; the blessed inherit, the cursed are cut off. Character shows in dealings. Grace makes a heart open-handed, not grasping.

The wicked borrows and does not repay, but the righteous is generous and gives; the blessed inherit, the cursed are cut off. Character shows in dealings. Grace makes a heart open-handed, not grasping.

'The steps of a good man are ordered by the LORD,' and though he stumble, he shall not be utterly cast down, for God upholds him. His path is guided and his falls are caught. The believer may slip but will not be flung away.

'The steps of a good man are ordered by the LORD,' and though he stumble, he shall not be utterly cast down, for God upholds him. His path is guided and his falls are caught. The believer may slip but will not be flung away.

David testifies that in all his years he never saw the righteous forsaken nor their children begging bread, for they are ever merciful and lending. God's care spans generations. The faithful and their seed are not abandoned.

David testifies that in all his years he never saw the righteous forsaken nor their children begging bread, for they are ever merciful and lending. God's care spans generations. The faithful and their seed are not abandoned.

'Depart from evil, and do good,' for the LORD loves judgment and the righteous shall dwell in the land for ever. Holiness has a sure future. To turn from evil and do good is to build on lasting ground.

'Depart from evil, and do good,' for the LORD loves judgment and the righteous shall dwell in the land for ever. Holiness has a sure future. To turn from evil and do good is to build on lasting ground.

'Depart from evil, and do good,' for the LORD loves judgment and the righteous shall dwell in the land for ever. Holiness has a sure future. To turn from evil and do good is to build on lasting ground.
The mouth of the righteous speaks wisdom, 'for the law of his God is in his heart,' so his steps do not slide. Inward truth steadies the walk. When God's word lives in the heart, the feet stay firm.
The mouth of the righteous speaks wisdom, 'for the law of his God is in his heart,' so his steps do not slide. Inward truth steadies the walk. When God's word lives in the heart, the feet stay firm.
Though the wicked watches to slay the righteous, 'the LORD will not leave him in his hand' nor condemn him at the judgment. God guards His own. No plot can prevail against the one the Lord protects.
Though the wicked watches to slay the righteous, 'the LORD will not leave him in his hand' nor condemn him at the judgment. God guards His own. No plot can prevail against the one the Lord protects.

'Wait on the LORD, and keep his way,' and you shall be exalted; David saw the wicked flourish like a green tree, then vanish, sought but not found. Patience outlasts pride. The towering wicked pass, but the waiting godly are lifted up.

'Wait on the LORD, and keep his way,' and you shall be exalted; David saw the wicked flourish like a green tree, then vanish, sought but not found. Patience outlasts pride. The towering wicked pass, but the waiting godly are lifted up.

'Wait on the LORD, and keep his way,' and you shall be exalted; David saw the wicked flourish like a green tree, then vanish, sought but not found. Patience outlasts pride. The towering wicked pass, but the waiting godly are lifted up.
'Mark the perfect man... for the end of that man is peace,' while transgressors are destroyed together. The close tells the tale. The upright end in peace; the rebellious end in ruin.
'Mark the perfect man... for the end of that man is peace,' while transgressors are destroyed together. The close tells the tale. The upright end in peace; the rebellious end in ruin.

'The salvation of the righteous is of the LORD,' their strength in trouble, who delivers them because they trust in Him. Rescue is all of grace. Those who take refuge in God will surely be saved by Him.

'The salvation of the righteous is of the LORD,' their strength in trouble, who delivers them because they trust in Him. Rescue is all of grace. Those who take refuge in God will surely be saved by Him.
